entries.title: Senate Bill Would Require AI Firms to Yield Half Ownership to Public
entries.summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) has introduced a bill that would impose a one-time 50% tax on the stock of the biggest artificial intelligence (AI) companies and deposit that stock into a new sovereign wealth fund, giving the public 50% ownership of the companies. entries.summary: Google has introduced its plans to fend off threats from increasingly sophisticated artificial intelligence (AI) agents. entries.title: Kalshi Integrates with StarCompliance to Bring Institutional Traders Inside the Compliance Perimeter
entries.summary: Kalshi has integrated with StarCompliance, giving financial firms a way to monitor employee trading in prediction markets alongside activity in equities, bonds and derivatives. entries.title: Kalshi Hits $5.5B in Crypto Perps, Expanding Beyond Prediction Markets
entries.summary: Kalshi’s crypto perpetual futures generated more than $5.5 billion in trading volume in their first two weeks. The company said it was the fastest-growing product launch in its history. The debut suggests Kalshi’s ambitions now extend beyond prediction markets. entries.title: FV Bank unveils unified fintech platform for stablecoins, payments and programmable finance
entries.summary: FV Bank today announced the expansion of its regulated financial infrastructure platform, bringing stablecoin settlement, digital asset custody, programmable payments, and cross-border banking rails into a single programmable financial layer.

entries.title: HSBC Australia Caught Napping on Scams — and It's Going to Cost AU$35 Million
entries.summary: Australia's corporate watchdog is taking HSBC to the Federal Court over a prolonged failure to protect customers from scammers, in what could become a defining case for how banks globally are held accountable for scam-related losses. entries.title: Kalshi Moves to Screen Potential Insiders Before Trades Are Placed
entries.summary: Prediction market operator Kalshi is introducing a new measure designed to identify potential insiders before trades are placed. The platform will begin collecting employment information from traders seeking access to certain contracts. The policy applies to markets that the company considers vulnerable to insider information or manipulation and forms part of a broader market integrity initiative

entries.title: Reform leader Farage urges BofE to drop Britcoin plans
entries.summary: Nigel Farage, the leader of UK populist party Reform UK, has urged Bank of England governor Andrew Bailey not to introduce a central bank digital currency, according to The Guardian.

entries.title: Deluxe agrees $625m acquisition of payment processor Celero
entries.summary: Deluxe, the company that invented the chequebook, has agreed a $625 million cash deal to buy payments processor Celero Commerce.
